There is a rumor of riches stored somewhere in Stormy Plains.
You found a small clearing which was left by a Bull's Bulldozer.
A bridge crosses over an abandoned gem mine.
Barley's Bar looks very inviting.
A trail winds up next to Mortis' Mortuary.
You hear a rumour of a treasure outside Forsaken Falls.
You found a clearing within the remains of a Sprout's thick vine hedge with sunshine streaming in from above.
The rusty remains of broken robo rumble robots can be found ahead.
There is a rumor of an adventurer whose demise was caused by a stealthy assassin using spinner blades.
A small path can be seen heading into some thorny brush.
An overgrown Stormy Plains can be seen ahead.
A deserted ritual space and a suspicious-looking turban can be seen ahead.
The path widens and there is a small field which looks perfect for a brawl ball game.
You spy an ancient-looking heist safe resting against a tree.
The path ahead winds down into a gem mine.
The birds and animals around you have suddenly gone silent.
There is a rumor that a rich El Rey Primo lives nearby.
You stumble upon a small grotto near Canale Grande.
A thin, rickety wooden bridge stretches across Kaboom Canyon.
You find a gem mine entrance covered in moss.
Thin tendrils of fog are starting to creep in as G.G Mortuary approaches.
There is a rumor of an ancient treasure nearby containing hundreds of rare pin packs.
A small glittering dagger can be seen ahead on the side of the path.
A path opens up into a clearing, and half a dozen of empty hair spray cans can be seen in the grass.
The path starts to thin and the trees feel like they are starting to reach towards you.
A mossy stone altar can be seen ahead, it has what looks like sticky bubblegum all over it.
A massive, short block of intricately-carved stone that is made to look like a bear can be seen on the side of the path.
You hear a strange noise, unlike any brawler you've heard before.
The birds suddenly stop singing and the silence in the forest is deafening. An open clearing with some crates and power cubes lies ahead.
Rusty metal scraps of Penny's and Jessie's turrets are strewn about on the path ahead.
You stumble across the very fresh remains of another unfortunate brawler who got teamed on.
A small trail across Skull Creek winds deeper into the forest.
You follow down a path covered in snow created from Gale's Gale Force.
You spy a Mr. P suitcase full of loot standing open beside a rock.
You stumble across an unfortunate brawler who wasn't able to escape Nani's Peep.
The path widens and there is a desolate area with just shotgun shells from Shelly's shotgun on the ground.
